[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100110 4
1 0110101 4
2 1111011 6
3 1011110 5
4 0101100 3
5 1100011 4
6 1110011 5
7 1011100 4

56 65 0100000 1

70 07 1010000 2
